# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/n71743ev/DUMUX/dumux/Aquifer/build-cmake
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Location of where to install python packages
DUNE_PYTHON_INSTALL_LOCATION:STRING=user

//Running in an external activated virtual environment
DUNE_PYTHON_SYSTEM_IS_VIRTUALENV:PATH=

//Using virtual environments when configuring Dune Python bindings.
//  When ON any Python binding packages are installed into an auto-generated
//  or any activated virtual environment in editable mode at configure
// time.  When OFF users have to take care of installing Python
// binding packages.  When OFF a script 'set-dune-pythonpath' is
// generated that may be used to enable the  Python binding packages
// by means of the PYTHONPATH variable.
DUNE_PYTHON_USE_VENV:BOOL=ON

//Executable for running MPI programs.
MPIEXEC_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/home/n71743ev/opt/openmpi-5/bin/mpiexec

//Maximum number of processors available to run MPI applications.
MPIEXEC_MAX_NUMPROCS:STRING=8

//Flag used by MPI to specify the number of processes for mpiexec;
// the next option will be the number of processes.
MPIEXEC_NUMPROC_FLAG:STRING=-n

//These flags will be placed after all flags passed to mpiexec.
MPIEXEC_POSTFLAGS:STRING=

//These flags will be directly before the executable that is being
// run by mpiexec.

dumux-Mixing_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=ON

//If this policy is set to FALSE, unscoped export names will not
// be visible in downstream projects.
//\n    This was the default behavior previous to DUNE 2.10.
//\n    Set this variable to FALSE only if you do not want compatibility
// with Dune 2.9 or earlier.
//\n    The old behavior will be completely removed after Dune 2.12
dumux-Mixing_POLICY_UNSCOPED_EXPORTED_TARGET_VISIBILITY:BOOL=TRUE
